columns.name: AVDNR
columns.description: Department number associated with the order

columns.name: ONSKETLEVUKE
columns.description: Desired delivery week for the order

columns.name: ONSKETLEVDATO
columns.description: Desired delivery date for the order

columns.name: TIDSPUNKT
columns.description: Timestamp when the order was placed or modified

columns.name: BRUKERID
columns.description: User who placed or modified the order

columns.name: BESTPR
columns.description: Best price for the item(s) in the order

columns.name: EDI_TIDSPUNKT
columns.description: Timestamp related to EDI processing or integration

columns.name: MASKINNAVN
columns.description: Name of the machine used in the order process

columns.name: AUTO_INNGANG
columns.description: Indicates if the entry was automatically generated
